testcase.name: 3200-dimension-relationship-node-formula-axis-testcase
Dimension Relationship Node Formula Axis Testcase
testcase.description: Table linkbase test case using a dimension relationship node with different formula axes

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with formulaAxis omitted
variation.description: Table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. No formula axis is specified, so the tree walk defaults to 'descendant-or-self'. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with formulaAxis omitted
variation.description: Table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. No formula axis is specified, so the tree walk defaults to 'descendant-or-self'.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with formulaAxis = descendant-or-self
variation.description: Table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. A formula axis of 'descendant-or-self' is specified, so the full tree of members is included. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with formulaAxis = descendant-or-self (with instance)
variation.description: Table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. A formula axis of 'descendant-or-self' is specified, so the full tree of members is included.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with formulaAxis = descendant
variation.description: Table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. A formula axis of 'descendant' is specified, so the relationship source itself is not included. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with formulaAxis = descendant (with instance)
variation.description: Table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. A formula axis of 'descendant' is specified, so the relationship source itself is not included.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with formulaAxis = child-or-self
variation.description: Table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. A formula axis of 'child-or-self' is specified, so only the relationship source and its immediate children are included. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with formulaAxis = child-or-self (with instance)
variation.description: Table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. A formula axis of 'child-or-self' is specified, so only the relationship source and its immediate children are included.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with formulaAxis = child
variation.description: Table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. A formula axis of 'child' is specified, so only the immediate children of the relationship source are included. The relationship source itself is not included. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with formulaAxis = child (with instance)
variation.description: Table with two columns (primary items m1, m2) and a tree of members for explicit dimension F as rows. A formula axis of 'child' is specified, so only the immediate children of the relationship source are included. The relationship source itself is not included.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with a formula axis expression
variation.description: Invalid table with a dimension relationship node that specifies the formula axis using an XPath expression. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with a formula axis expression, with instance
variation.description: Invalid table with a dimension relationship node that specifies the formula axis using an XPath expression.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with an invalid formula axis expression
variation.description: Invalid table with a dimension relationship node that specifies the formula axis using an XPath expression that does not evaluate to a valid value from the enumeration.

variation.name: Dimension relationship node with a formula axis expression that evaluates to a sequence
variation.description: Invalid table with a dimension relationship node that specifies the formula axis using an XPath expression that evaluates to a sequence of values.
